description: Governance and SDLC compliance checks. Covers service classification, SDLC gates, and external attestations for monitoring, security, incident management, and review sign-offs.

checkpoints.title: Service class explicitly defined
checkpoints.description: Service tier and classification (internal tool, customer-facing, data pipeline, etc.) must be declared in service metadata.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Add a service_class or tier field to your service.yaml metadata file.

checkpoints.title: Code ownership file exists
checkpoints.description: CODEOWNERS or owners.txt must define who is accountable for this service.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Add a CODEOWNERS file at the repo root or .github/. Map file paths to owning teams.

checkpoints.title: Engineering review evidence committed
checkpoints.description: Evidence of engineering review completion must be committed to the repo.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Commit your engineering review artifacts to docs/reviews/. Include the review-baseline.json as a minimum.

checkpoints.title: Rollback documentation committed
checkpoints.description: Rollback procedures must be committed before production deployment.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Create and commit docs/ROLLBACK.md before your first production deployment.

checkpoints.title: DRI and operational docs exist
checkpoints.description: Both on-call rotation and at least one runbook must be committed — build-it-run-it accountability.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Commit both an on-call doc (docs/ONCALL.md) and at least one runbook (docs/runbooks/) before production launch.

checkpoints.title: Audit/compliance logging implemented
checkpoints.description: Security-relevant actions (auth events, config changes, data access) must be audit logged.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Emit structured audit log events for: login/logout, permission checks, config changes, and data access.

checkpoints.title: Monitoring and alerting configured
checkpoints.description: Production monitoring and alerting must be configured and verified before launch.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Attest in .readiness/external-evidence.json that monitoring is configured with a link to your alert rules.

checkpoints.title: Production dashboards deployed
checkpoints.description: Live production dashboards must be deployed and accessible to the team.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Attest in .readiness/external-evidence.json with a link to your production dashboard.

checkpoints.title: SLOs wired into auto-outage detection
checkpoints.description: SLO breaches must trigger automated alerts and outage detection.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Attest that SLO breach alerts are configured and linked to your incident management system.

checkpoints.title: Incident management team registered
checkpoints.description: Service must be registered in the incident management platform with an active on-call rotation.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Register in your incident management platform (PagerDuty, OpsGenie, ICM) and attest with a link to your rotation.

checkpoints.title: Security review sign-off obtained
checkpoints.description: A security review must be completed and signed off before production launch.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Complete a security review with your security team and attest with a link to the review record.

checkpoints.title: Privacy review sign-off obtained
checkpoints.description: A privacy review must be completed for any service handling personal data.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Complete a privacy review with your privacy team and attest with a link to the review record.

checkpoints.title: Capacity review validated
checkpoints.description: Capacity planning has been reviewed and validated by the infrastructure team.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Have your capacity plan reviewed and attest with a link to the review or approval.

checkpoints.title: Engineering review sign-off obtained
checkpoints.description: Formal engineering review sign-off must be recorded before production launch.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Obtain engineering review sign-off and attest with a link to the review record or PR.

checkpoints.title: Operational review sign-off obtained
checkpoints.description: Formal operational review sign-off must be recorded before production launch.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Obtain operational review sign-off and attest with a link to the review record.

checkpoints.title: Red team or adversarial assessment completed
checkpoints.description: For AI or high-risk services, a red team assessment must be completed and recorded.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Complete a red team or adversarial assessment and attest with a link to the findings report.
